description: Composition White brief made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex fabric, has the signature logo on the left side in rubber print, shaped-to-Fit contoured pouch, stitch detailing and printed label on the inner Fit Hip rise Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cold iron if needed Revel in the comfort of soft cotton/spandex fabric with these white hip briefs from spykar. Crafted from a quick dry fabric, the cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the printed label offers abrasion-free comfort.
